versions.version_description: I just think it sounds better and more closely reflects how the song really is played.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Intro:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
Da da da n da da, Da da da n da da[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                x2
Da da da n da da da da[/tab]

Verse:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Grew up in a small town[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch]
And when the rain would fall down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch] 
I'd just stare out my window[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] 
Dreaming of what could be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch] 
And if I'd end up happy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
I would pray [/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Trying hard to reach out[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch] 
But when I tried to speak out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch] 
Felt like no one could hear me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] 
Wanted to belong here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch] 
But something felt so wrong here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] 
So I'd pray [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
I could break away [/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]  
I'll spread my wings and I'll learn how to fly.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]        
I'll do what it takes till I touch the sky. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Make a wish, take a chance, [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
Make a change, and break away. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Out of the darkness and into the sun. [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
But I won't forget all the ones that I love.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch] 
I'll take a risk, take a chance, [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Make a change, and break away [/tab]

Intro x1

Verse:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Wanna feel the warm breeze [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]
Sleep under a palm tree[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Feel the rush of the ocean [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Get onboard a fast train [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Travel on a jetplane[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
Far away [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
And break away [/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
I'll spread my wings and I'll learn how to fly.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'll do what it takes till I touch the sky. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Make a wish, take a chance, [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
Make a change, and break away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch] 
Out of the darkness and into the sun. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Dm[/ch]
But I won't forget all the ones that I love.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch] 
I'll take a risk, take a chance, [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Make a change, and break away [/tab]

Bridge:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Buildings with a hundred floors [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Swinging with revolving doors [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
Maybe I don't know where they'll take me [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Gotta keep movin on movin on[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch] 
Fly away [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Break away [/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
I'll spread my wings and I'll learn how to fly.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch] 
Though it's not easy to tell you goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] 
Make a wish, take a chance, [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
Make a change, and break away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch] 
Out of the darkness and into the sun.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch] 
But I won't forget the place I come from[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch] 
I gotta take a risk, take a chance, [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
Make a change, and break away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
Break away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
Break away[/tab]
